MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS DENIED FOR INSUFFICIENT SERVICE. MOTION WAS SERVED BY MAIL ON JUNE 26. THE EARLIEST IT COULD BE HEARD IS JULY 28, 2008. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
